disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Eighteen Americans were isolated for weeks in a Nebraska quarantine facility after being exposed to a deadly hantavirus on a cruise ship. Many found the experience traumatic. https://nyti.ms/4wR3zeI - facebook.com
